pattern: Scan the string once, tracking the current run length and updating the maximum whenever the run breaks.
hints: Walk through the string character by character and maintain a counter for the current streak of identical characters.
Reset the counter to 1 whenever the character changes, and update a global maximum after each step.
A single pass suffices — you only need O(1) extra space besides the answer.

edge_inputs.description: run at the start then drops
multiple runs of same length, pick first max

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    s = ''.join(rng.choice(list('abcde')) for _ in range(size))
    return [s]
